mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_lock_state (user_id, user_type, locked, failed_login_count, last_failed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userType}, 0, 1, #{now}, #{now}, #{now}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1, last_failed_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now}
